title: What Rocket Science Actually Is
shortSummary: The first principles of rocketry — why rockets work, how Newton's laws apply, and what makes spaceflight fundamentally different from aviation.
whyItMatters: Every rocket engineer starts here. Understanding why a rocket works — reaction mass, thrust, and the tyranny of the rocket equation — is the foundation everything else builds on. SpaceX was built on first principles thinking applied to this exact knowledge.
coreConcepts: Newton's Third Law applied to propulsion
